## Tags
brush, paintbrush, design, color, colour, decoration, diy

## Categories
text, design, photography, home, tools

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/paintbrush-vertical)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::PaintbrushVertical;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        PaintbrushVertical { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
